prevalence.trend: stable; localized areas with iodine imbalance

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; cosmetic and compressive symptoms in some cases

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical neck exam and thyroid ultrasound; TSH evaluation

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions with goiter or nodular thyroid
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with monitoring and iodine balance programs

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound and lab testing available in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation, treat iodine imbalance; surgery if compressive or suspicious nodules
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Uneven access to ultrasound in smaller municipalities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Iodized salt programs and endocrinology services
